title: Sum of Mutated Array Closest to Target
titleCn: 转变数组后最接近目标值的数组和

testcases.input: arr = [4,9,3], target = 10 Output: 3 Explanation: When using 3 arr converts to [3, 3, 3] which sums 9 and that's the optimal answer.
testcases.expectedOutput: 3 Explanation: When using 3 arr converts to [3, 3, 3] which sums 9 and that's the optimal answer.
